title: Instance
content:
# Instance

### get_instance_settings_kelvin_cluster(_dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.InstanceSettingsKelvinClusterGet

Retrieve the Cluster Instance Settings.


### update_instance_settings_kelvin_cluster(data: Optional[Union[requests.InstanceSettingsKelvinClusterUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.InstanceSettingsKelvinClusterUpdate

Updates an existing Kelvin Cluster Instance Settings with any new values passed through the body parameters. All body parameters are optional and if not provided will remain unchanged.

Permanently delete an existing Instance Setting. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.

Retrieve the parameters of an Instance Setting.

from kelvin.api import Client
